task_completion.description: Verify the quote subject and organization name are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Q-2024-GreenTech-Peripherals' in the Subject field and 'GreenTech Solutions' in the Organization Name field on the Quote form or details page.

task_completion.description: Verify the Quote Stage and Valid Until date are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Quote Stage dropdown/field set to 'Created' and the Valid Until date field set to '2025-03-31'.

task_completion.description: Verify the quote description is entered exactly as requested.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Peripheral equipment quote for GreenTech Solutions Q1 2025 office refresh' in the Description text area.

task_completion.description: Verify the Wireless Bluetooth Headsets are added with the correct quantity and price.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Wireless Bluetooth Headset' in the item details table with a quantity of 25 and a list price of 49.99.

task_completion.description: Verify the USB-C Docking Stations are added with the correct quantity and price.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'USB-C Docking Station' in the item details table with a quantity of 10 and a list price of 129.99.

task_completion.description: Verify the Ergonomic Keyboards are added with the correct quantity and price.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Ergonomic Keyboard' in the item details table with a quantity of 15 and a list price of 79.99.

task_completion.description: Verify the quote is successfully saved and the grand total is correctly calculated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the saved Quote details view (not just the edit form) and verify the Grand Total at the bottom of the item table shows 3749.50.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Vtiger CRM UI, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely filled out the form over multiple steps.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a progression of screenshots showing the agent typing into fields, selecting dropdowns, and adding line items one by one.

integrity.description: Verify the final result is within the actual CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshot must be the authentic Vtiger CRM 'Quote Details' page, not a text editor, mocked HTML page, or a generic spreadsheet.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Quote Subject: 'Q-2024-GreenTech-Peripherals'. Expected Organization: 'GreenTech Solutions'. Expected Stage: 'Created'. Expected Valid Until: '2025-03-31'. Expected Products and Quantities: 'Wireless Bluetooth Headset' (Qty: 25, Price: 49.99), 'USB-C Docking Station' (Qty: 10, Price: 129.99), 'Ergonomic Keyboard' (Qty: 15, Price: 79.99). Expected Grand Total: 3749.50.
